raw_consumer_statement: Someone took my identity to open up a Home Depot Citi credit card. I did notify Home Depot multiple times that it's a fraudulent claim which I DID NOT make those purchases at the store and open up this account. I did also file a police report regarding about this issue. I did email their investigation department if they could check their cameras to proof that I did make those purchases at the store but up until now they just send me a billing statement with late fees that is added on each month. Home Depot told me the account was open up 7 months ago and those purchases was made 1 month ago when the account was open with my old address, old name which I no longer live there. Those purchases was made on XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX of this year. Right now I was charge the amount of those purchases and late fee in the total of {$660.00} under XXXX different Home Depot location which located at XXXX XXXX  and XXXX XXXX  but which I NEVER been there to do purchases. I'm the victim but Home Depot still request me to be responsible on this account with unpaid balance.
